title: King Cole 641759 Big Value Super Chunky Air Force Yarn - 81M, 100g
features: QUICK & SATISFYING PROJECTS: The super chunky weight of this yarn allows your creations to grow incredibly fast, making it perfect for last-minute gifts or for anyone who loves seeing quick results from their knitting or crochet.

BEAUTIFULLY SOFT & GENTLE: Made from 100% premium acrylic, this yarn is exceptionally soft to the touch and gentle against the skin, ensuring your handmade garments and accessories are a cosy joy to wear.

EFFORTLESS CARE: Designed for modern life, this yarn is fully machine washable at 40°C and can be tumble dried on a cool setting, making it a practical and durable choice for everyday items that will see plenty of use.

EXCEPTIONAL VALUE: True to its name, the Big Value range offers fantastic quality and generous yardage in each 100g ball. This allows you to complete larger projects, such as blankets and jumpers, affordably.

VERSATILE FOR ALL CREATIONS: With a fabulous range of classic and contemporary shades available, this yarn is your go-to for all kinds of projects, from warm winter cardigans to stylish hats, scarves, and home accessories.
description: Experience the perfect blend of quality, value, and speed with King Cole Big Value Super Chunky yarn. This wonderfully soft, 100% premium acrylic yarn is a dream to work with, helping you create beautiful, substantial projects in no time at all. Its super chunky weight is ideal for crafting warm winter jumpers, cosy blankets, and fashionable accessories that feel as good as they look. Practicality is key, which is why this durable yarn is fully machine washable, making it perfect for items that will see plenty of love and use. Available in a wide array of stunning colours, the King Cole Big Value Super Chunky is the ultimate choice for knitters and crocheters seeking satisfying results and excellent performance.
